title: ACSS Permission Profile
description: A permission profile that defines how credentials are exposed to an AI agent. Part of the Agent Credential Sandboxing Standard (ACSS) v1.0.

name.description: Unique identifier for the profile. Lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens only.

description.description: Human-readable description of the profile's purpose.

trustLevel.description: Trust level from 0 (no trust) to 100 (full trust). Injected as AGENTVAULT_TRUST.

ttlSeconds.description: Maximum session duration in seconds. 0 means no timeout.

rules.description: Ordered array of permission rules. Evaluated using last-match-wins semantics.

pattern.description: Match pattern: "*" (all), "PREFIX_*" (prefix match), or exact variable name.
